## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.13

### 🛡️ Devices and Entities
- Restores practical diagnostic entities for IP address, SSID, Wi-Fi signal strength, zone name, and location.
- Keeps lower-level protocol/debug fields in downloadable diagnostics instead of normal device entities.
- Prevents restored network/location entities from being removed as obsolete entries during startup cleanup.

### 📷 Cameras
- Includes the recent camera live-view path correction from the prerelease channel.
